title: Kazhugu 2
desc: Two thieves get mistaken for huntsmen upon reaching a new place. So, they use the misunderstanding as an opportunity to take advantage and hide from the law.

title: Hyper
desc: Suryanarayana Murthy, is protective of his father, who is an honest government officer. However, when a politician causes trouble for his father, Surya strives to protect him.

title: Salaar Part 1: Ceasefire
desc: Just when the prince of Khansaar is about to rise to the throne, a plan of overthrowing him is exercised and only one man can help him retrieve power.

title: Prabhas
desc: Prabha prepares to meet Nandini, his childhood friend, at a reunion party organised by his father. However, things take a turn when Nisha, a gangster's daughter, falls in love with him.

title: Vinaya Vidheya Rama
desc: Facing a menacing criminal kingpin, Ram fights to protect his family. Soon, he embarks on a daring mission to topple the villain and dismantle his corrupt empire.

title: Oh My Ghost
desc: Gemini saidWhen a woman and her friends reach a small town, they uncover a link to a ghost and realise their grandfather left behind a secret legacy that changes their lives forever.

title: King of Kotha
desc: Heartbroken on being back-stabbed by his childhood friend, Raju, an influential man, runs away from his hometown, Kotha. Soon, to bring back order in the town, a police officer plots a plan.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Majili
desc: Poorna, an aspiring cricketer, falls into a deep depression after being abandoned by his lover, Anshu. Despite this, he is forced to marry his neighbour Sravani, who secretly has feelings for him.

title: Sangili Bungili Kadhava Thorae
desc: Vasu, a young broker, purchases a bungalow for his family in the outskirts of town. However, they soon start to feel the presence of supernatural forces in the building.

title: Comali
desc: A long coma leaves Ravi disorientated in an unrecognisable world. However, he sets out on a journey to reclaim his past and adapt to a new reality.

title: Gandhi Kannadi
desc: An event organizer orchestrates a grand diamond jubilee for an elderly gentleman. This profound assignment facilitates an unexpected journey involving sentimental aspirations and sincere bonds.

title: Kadaisi Ulaga Por
desc: In the year 2028, a power struggle on an international level creates political turmoil in India. Thamizh, a common man, rises to the occasion to save the day.

title: Nanban
desc: Two friends set out to find their friend from college, who taught them how to be more than just victims of circumstance. Along the way, they discover previously unknown truths.

title: Lift
desc: A man's first day on the job turns into a nightmare after some vengeful spirits begin to create trouble by trapping him in an elevator.
